source_documents.synthetic_label: Fictional intake summary uploaded by sample user
Fictional list of documents to bring to an appointment
source_documents.notes: No real clinic names, phone numbers, emails, addresses, dates of birth, or real records.

patient_reported_concerns.reported_text: Fictional person wants help organizing questions before an in-person dental visit.

external_plan_quotes.quoted_text: Synthetic note says: bring prior records if available.
external_plan_quotes.context_note: Stored as a source quote only, without judging correctness.

travel_timing_constraints: Fictional traveler expects limited time in Taiwan.
Fictional appointment window is uncertain and must be discussed with a dentist or clinic staff.
cost_administrative_constraints: Fictional user wants to ask what documents may be needed for receipts or insurance paperwork.
No price estimate, price guarantee, or affordability judgment is provided.

missing_information.why_it_matters_for_workflow: May help a human reviewer understand document history.
missing_information.suggested_human_question: Which prior records would be helpful to bring?

missing_information.why_it_matters_for_workflow: Relevant for preparation and human review.
missing_information.suggested_human_question: Should an updated medication list be prepared before the visit?

questions_for_human_review: Which documents are missing or unclear?
Which source supports each summary item?
What should be clarified during an in-person appointment?
